C'est quoi la vitamine C ? C'est un nutriment essentiel, également appelé acide ascorbique, que le corps humain ne peut ni fabriquer ni stocker, ce qui rend son apport quotidien par l'alimentation obligatoire. Elle joue un rôle d'antioxydant puissant en protégeant les cellules contre le vieillissement, tout en stimulant le système immunitaire pour aider le corps à se défendre contre les infections. Cette vitamine est aussi indispensable à la fabrication du collagène, une protéine qui structure la peau, les vaisseaux sanguins et les os, et elle double l'absorption du fer d'origine végétale dans l'intestin. On la trouve en abondance dans les fruits frais, particulièrement les agrumes, les kiwis et les baies, ainsi que dans les légumes crus comme les poivrons et le brocoli. il ya 1 miligramme de vitamine C dans une ejaculation #Asterion #jeudelabiscotte #vitaminec @Asterion

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Are they really back? Yes, absolutely. We exclusively tested both new Mercurial models in Madrid (thanks to @Nike Football and @hubcommnet), as always, we want to give you every possible detail to build your own opinion: visuals, product insights, but most importantly our real feedback after using them on pitch, in matches and during specific training sessions that seriously “stressed” both boots. The new Superfly sends a very clear message as soon as you put it on: innovation built to deliver maximum propulsion. That’s exactly what the forefoot “plate” gives you, an aggressive sense of push and energy return that you can genuinely feel while sprinting. Vapor changes too and the almost “strange” feeling when wearing it for the first time is actually maximum comfort. Not because Mercurial Vapor has never been comfortable, but comfort has probably never been the first thing that comes to mind when thinking about this boot. Other details you’ll definitely want to know: Vapor is the lightest Mercurial ever made at just 130g, while Superfly features a very grippy upper despite being a product fully focused on speed and sprinting. Sizing? Stay relaxed with your usual Nike size, this is 100% true to size. We have a lot more content directly filmed in Madrid coming very soon, so as always, feel free to leave your questions in the comments. There’s a lot more coming... #bootsculture #NikeMercurial #Mercurial #footballboots

no one tells you how much guessing comes with starting a home bakery👇🏻 how much ingredients to buy, how much dough to make, when to prep, how to take orders, how to price everything, and how to market yourself. when i first started, i had no real system. i was just figuring it out as i went. 👩‍🍳✨ inside my home baker guide, i share the things i wish i had when i started: • my 3 day prep system • pre-order form + template • pricing sheets • marketing tips • systems to help you stay organized and sell with more confidence if you’re a home baker trying to take your business seriously and stop figuring everything out alone, comment SYSTEM and i’ll send it over. 📍🍪for cookie orders: pre-orders open every monday at 9pm on my instagram #cookies #cookiebusiness #bakingbusiness #homebaker #baking

POV: when you find our halal Chinese bakery in Manchester Chinatown!  If you don’t know 99% of our Chinese bakery is fully halal! We don’t use lard, gelatine, pork or alcohol in our ingredients.  The only item we have that is not halal. Is our char siu. We don’t cook this in our bakery we have this delivered from Happy Seasons Kitchen. Which is completely separate from all our baked goods.  #chinesebakery #chinesebakeryhalal #halalbakery #halalfood #fyp

Tuto cils                                                                 Mascara: @KIKO Milano extra volume wash of @L’Oreal Paris Makeup & Hair télescopique lift waterproof

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе

Dumbbell Sumo Squat  Know the difference  1. Dumbbell Position Hold the dumbbell with both hands naturally hanging between your legs, rather than holding it at your chest. This allows you to lift heavier weights without being limited by arm strength. 2. Torso Posture Maintain a slight forward lean instead of staying fully upright. Leaning forward increases hip flexion, helping to stretch and better activate the glutes. 3. Stance Width and Foot Angle Set your feet about 1.5 times shoulder-width apart, with your toes pointing outward at roughly a 45-degree angle. If the stance is too wide, the inner thigh muscles (adductors) will take over, reducing glute activation. 4. Load Path As you squat down, the dumbbell should not stay directly under your shoulders. Instead, it should fall slightly behind the midline, closer to your posterior chain. Bring your hands slightly inward to keep the load closer to your center of mass, which helps reduce lower back strain and improves movement efficiency. #gymtips #quads #gluteworkout #gym #gymrat
